_description: Editorial subject queue for daily entries. The cron pulls the FIRST item before falling back to the auto-picker. Each item can be a plain string or an object with {subject, query?, notes?}. If the chosen query returns zero Unsplash results, generate-daily.js falls back to the auto-picker (Wave 73). Items pop after each run regardless of whether the queue subject was used.

_format_examples.subject: Bagger 288
_format_examples.notes: Largest land vehicle on Earth, should rate 9.5+

_authoring_notes: VERIFY Unsplash has results for `query` before queueing. Check at: https://unsplash.com/s/photos/<query>
If `query` is omitted, the script auto-derives one from `subject` (comma-qualifier reversed).

queue.subject: Cargo Ship, Ever Given
queue.notes: The Suez Canal blocker. 220,000 tons gross. Instantly recognizable culturally.

queue.subject: Crane, Liebherr LR 13000
queue.notes: World's largest conventional crawler crane. 3,000-ton capacity. Bart's favorite manufacturer.
